zh.lifeSummary: 當Martin Cunningham於1828年4月1日出生在美國紐約州時，他的父親Russell J Cunningham GG#325歲，母親Julia Ann Way21歲。他於1852年1月15日與Caroline Wheelock在美國威斯康辛州文巴格奧申可申 堂文巴格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1870年住在美國愛阿華州且於1880年住在美國愛阿華州弗洛伊德弗洛伊德。他去世於1902年4月2日在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特享年74歲，埋葬在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特巴度拉 堂史普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martin Cunningham于1828年4月1日出生在美国纽约州时，他的父亲Russell J Cunningham GG#325岁，母亲Julia Ann Way21岁。他于1852年1月15日与Caroline Wheelock在美国威斯康辛州文巴格奧申可申 堂文巴格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1870年住在美国艾奥瓦州且于1880年住在美国艾奥瓦州弗洛伊德弗洛伊德。他去世于1902年4月2日在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特享年74岁，埋葬在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特巴度拉 堂史普。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Martin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Martinus. This was probably originally derived from Mars (genitive Martis), the name of the Roman god of war (and earlier of fertility). Martin became very popular in the Middle Ages, especially on the Continent, as a result of the fame of St Martin of Tours . He was born the son of a Roman officer in Upper Pannonia (an outpost of the Roman Empire, now part of Hungary), and, although he became a leading figure in the 4th-century Church, he is chiefly remembered now for having divided his cloak in two and given half to a beggar. The name was also borne by five popes, including one who defended Roman Catholic dogma against Eastern Orthodox theology. He died after suffering imprisonment and privations in Naxos and public humiliation in Constantinople, and was promptly acclaimed a martyr by supporters of the Roman Church. Among Protestants, the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the German theologian Martin Luther ( 1483–1546 ); Martin was used as a symbolic name for the Protestant Church in satires by both Dryden and Swift. A further influence may be its use as the given name of the civil-rights leader Martin Luther King ( 1929–68 ).

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
Historical Boundaries: 1855: Floyd, Iowa, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Sorry Mr. President, You can't do that.
historicEvents.description: This Act was to restrict the power of the President removing certain office holders without approval of the Senate. It denies the President the power to remove any executive officer who had been appointed by the president with the advice and consent of the Senate, unless the Senate approved the removal during the next full session of Congress. The Amendment was later repealed.
Historical Boundaries: 1883: Hubbard, Minnesota, United States

historicEvents.title: The Minnesota State Flag
historicEvents.description: The Flag of Minnesota was adopted on August 2 and consists of scenes from the seal of Minnesota. The flag has been modified over the years to be easier to manufacture.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Flag of Minnesota

en.lifeSummary: When Martin Cunningham was born on 1 April 1828, in New York, United States, his father, Russell J Cunningham GG#3, was 25 and his mother, Julia Ann Way, was 21. He married Caroline Wheelock on 15 January 1852, in Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Iowa, United States in 1870 and Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, United States in 1880. He died on 2 April 1902, in Hubbard, Minnesota, United States, at the age of 74, and was buried in Badoura Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martin Cunningham est né le 1 avril 1828, à New York, États-Unis, son père, Russell J Cunningham GG#3, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Julia Ann Way, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Caroline Wheelock le 15 janvier 1852, à Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Iowa, États-Unis en 1870 et à Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, États-Unis en 1880. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1902, à Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Badoura Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis.

Januar 1852 in Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten Caroline Wheelock geheiratet. ja.Saratoga Springs, Saratoga, New York, Un: アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州サラトガサラトガ スプリングズ
ja.New York City, New York, United States: アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイ
ja.lifeSummary: Martin Cunninghamが1828年4月1日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州で生まれた時，父Russell J Cunningham GG#3は25歳，母Julia Ann Wayは21歳であった。1852年1月15日にアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州ウィネバゴオシュコッシュ トウンウィネバゴでCaroline Wheelockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1870年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州に，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州フロイドフロイドに住んでいた。彼は1902年4月2日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードで74歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードバドウラ トウンシュイップにて埋葬された。

ko.Oshkosh, Winnebago, Wisconsin, United St: 미국 위스콘신 주 윈바고 오시코시 타운

ko.Badoura Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Un: 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 바다라 타운시프
ko.Saratoga Springs, Saratoga, New York, Un: 미국 뉴욕 주 사라토가 사라토가 스프링스
ko.New York City, New York, United States: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티
ko.lifeSummary: Martin Cunningham(이)가 1828년 4월 1일 미국 뉴욕 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Russell J Cunningham GG#3(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Julia Ann Way(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1852년 1월 15일 미국 위스콘신 주 윈바고 오시코시 타운 윈바고에서 Caroline Wheelock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1870년도에 미국 아이오와 주에서, 1880년도에 미국 아이오와 주 플로이드 플로이드에서 살았다. 그는 1902년 4월 2일 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 바다라 타운시프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martin Cunningham nasceu em 1 de abril de 1828, em Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Russell J Cunningham GG#3, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Julia Ann Way, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Caroline Wheelock em 15 de janeiro de 1852, em Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1870 e em Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1880. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1902, em Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Badoura Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martin Cunningham родился 1 апреля 1828 г. в местности Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Russell J Cunningham GG#3 было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Julia Ann Way, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Caroline Wheelock 15 января 1852 г. в местности виннебаго, ошкош тоун, виннебаго, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году и в местности флоид, флоид, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Он умер 2 апреля 1902 г. в местности хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности бадоура тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martin Cunningham nació el 1 de abril de 1828, en Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Russell J Cunningham GG#3, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Julia Ann Way, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Caroline Wheelock el 15 de enero de 1852, en Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1870 y en Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió el 2 de abril de 1902, en Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Badoura Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos.
